calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Assigned for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Leland Batara; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff appears by Tullio Mello, with counsel, Robert Garcia, Esq.; no appearance by or for defendant. Tullio Mello is sworn and examined for plaintiff. Plaintiff's Exhibits are admitted evidence and withdrawn at the conclusion of the hearing: #1: Rental agreement; #2: 3-day notice. The court awards judgment for plaintiff, against defendant. Judgment signed and filed this date.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Continued To Oct-15-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Robert P. Garcia, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court ordered the matter off calendar. The request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
